root_text.sn56.102:1.1: Atha kho bhagavā parittaṁ nakhasikhāyaṁ paṁsuṁ āropetvā bhikkhū āmantesi:
root_text.sn56.102:1.2: “taṁ kiṁ maññatha, bhikkhave, katamaṁ nu kho bahutaraṁ—
root_text.sn56.102:1.3: yo vāyaṁ mayā paritto nakhasikhāyaṁ paṁsu āropito, ayaṁ vā mahāpathavī”ti?
root_text.sn56.102:1.6: appamattakāyaṁ bhagavatā paritto nakhasikhāyaṁ paṁsu āropito.
root_text.sn56.102:1.7: Saṅkhampi na upeti, upanidhampi na upeti, kalabhāgampi na upeti mahāpathaviṁ upanidhāya bhagavatā paritto nakhasikhāyaṁ paṁsu āropito”ti.
root_text.sn56.102:1.8: “Evameva kho, bhikkhave, appakā te sattā ye manussā cutā manussesu paccājāyanti; atha kho eteva bahutarā sattā ye manussā cutā niraye paccājāyanti …pe….

translation_text.sn56.102:0.3: Passing Away as Humans and Reborn in Hell
translation_text.sn56.102:1.8: “… the sentient beings who die as humans and are reborn as humans are few, while those who die as humans and are reborn in hell are many …”
